statement.en: Hadwiger-Nelson problem: What is the chromatic number χ(ℝ²) of the unit-distance graph in the plane, where vertices are points of ℝ² and edges connect points at distance exactly 1?
statement.ja: Hadwiger-Nelson 問題: 平面上の単位距離グラフ (頂点=ℝ² 上の点, 辺=距離 1 の点対) の彩色数 χ(ℝ²) は？

reiTyping.dfumt8Reason: χ 値の決定問題 (離散 5|6|7) × ℝ² 連続構造のブリッジ. de Grey 2018 で下界 5 確定後、範囲が狭い BOTH 型
reiTyping.rationale: 型=I_INFINITE_SEARCH_SPACE (χ 決定), 副=VI_BRIDGING (離散-連続), D-FUMT₈=BOTH; 形式化=scaffold (実 sorry=5 in 508.lean)

external: Isbell / Soifer — χ ≤ 7 via hexagonal tiling (upper bound)

formalization.notes: Namespaces: Erdos508. 実 file は 101 行: UnitDistancePlaneGraph 定義 + χ(ℝ²) 記法 + HadwigerNelsonProblem (2 sorry: answer+body) + AtLeastFive (1 sorry, de Grey 2018) + AtLeast4 (1 sorry, Moser-Spindel) + AtMostSeven (1 sorry, Isbell) + AtLeastThree (正規的 Lean 証明, sorry なし). 合計 5 sorry.

known_progress.event: Aubrey de Grey arXiv:1804.02385 — χ(ℝ²) ≥ 5 via 1,581-vertex unit-distance graph (polymath16 project で翌月 553 vertex に短縮)
known_progress.impact: 55 年ぶり下界更新. χ ∈ {5, 6, 7} に絞られる

reiAssessment.approachSuggestion: (1) de Grey 2018 graph の SAT 証明を native_decide で Lean 4 確定 → AtLeastFive の sorry 閉鎖. (2) AtLeast4 (Moser-Spindel) は 7-vertex graph で native_decide 可能. (3) AtMostSeven は hexagonal partition の geometric lemma が重労働
reiAssessment.solveRationale: Familiar=False, primaryType=I_INFINITE_SEARCH_SPACE + VI_BRIDGING, dfumt8=BOTH, formalization=scaffold (5 sorry). SAT-based 下界は decidable で tractable, 上界は geometric で難
reiAssessment.formalizationNotes: 下界 3, 4, 5 は有限グラフで decidable. 上界 7 は平面 tessellation lemma が要. χ 値の厳密決定 (5|6|7) は open
reiAssessment.famousHardCap: 世界的 open 問題 — 完全解決は藤本さん判断事項
